wiki.summary: Slayr enlists the help of ezcodylee for the aggressive, rage-infused track “Wipe Yo Nose.” On the track, the duo raps about sex, drugs, ending oppositions, and living a “rockstar lifestyle”. An original version of this track, titled “Flow State,” was exclusively released on Luxe 0.1 via SoundCloud. This version of the track featured a solo verse from slayr and a slightly altered yet slowed-down instrumental.“Wipe Yo Nose” by slayr Read more on Last.fm.
wiki.content: Slayr enlists the help of ezcodylee for the aggressive, rage-infused track “Wipe Yo Nose.” On the track, the duo raps about sex, drugs, ending oppositions, and living a “rockstar lifestyle”. An original version of this track, titled “Flow State,” was exclusively released on Luxe 0.1 via SoundCloud. This version of the track featured a solo verse from slayr and a slightly altered yet slowed-down instrumental.“Wipe Yo Nose” by slayr & ezcodylee was produced by slayr & Chris Marek slayr & ezcodylee released “Wipe Yo Nose” on November 5, 2025.
